mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.BRCD is not null

SELECT
FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.BRCD is not null
ORDER BY ci.NO
ASC
DESC
mapper.sql: ci.HDQR_BOB_DCD , ci.CDN , ci.FRRG_TS , ci.BDGT_TSTM_USE_HMS, ci.AMSL_AMT , ci.AFST_NM , ci.BZDY_YN, ci.TSTM_YMD , ci.TSTM_NO , ci.BRCD , ci.NO , ci.TPBS_NM , ci.AFST_BZN , ci.AMSL_AFST_NO , ci.AFST_TPBCD , ci.AFST_DTL_ADR , ci.BRNC_ADR , co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , co.RSRE_YMD
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.BRCD is not null
ORDER BY ci.FRRG_TS
ASC
DESC

SELECT ci.TSTM_YMD , ci.TSTM_NO , ci.BRCD FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.BRCD is not null
and ci.NO < #{no}
and ci.NO > #{no}
ORDER BY ci.NO
ASC
DESC
limit 1
